reductionSummary.note: All 84 trueBalanceMismatch rows match a loose unallocated-payment pattern (medium confidence). None have a tight payment-to-variance match; inverse/duplicate/manual rows should be fixed before import. needsOpeningBalanceAdjustment is reserved for true gaps with no payment/credit/inverse explanation.
